reviews.review_description: I thought this was a unique puzzle type game.  You have to program robots to conduct tasks. So you may solve each task differently than someone else. And there is the basic attainment for each task or you can maximize it by increasing productivity. I liked the graphics and the world. Inside a large steampunk tree. The story line was creative. I only got stuck on one task i had to get a hint on and it was near the end.

reviews.review_title: Wish there was a full version.
reviews.review_description: I want hours and hours of this. Even open it up for us to make our own levels. One of the best vr experiences I have had.

I couldn’t stop playing it after I started. It was relaxing and a nice escape from reality. I love working by myself and problem solving I felt a sense of accomplishment after completing the game it was very rewarding. I wish there was more like it.

reviews.review_title: My absolute worst experience on Quest
reviews.review_description: I loved A Fisherman's Tale 1 and 2 but this was horrible. The door that must be opened after the intro was pitch black. When I managed to get it open by groping around, I entered a room that was almost completely pitch black. I placed the first gizmo and was given another, but couldn't see anything to do with it because everything else was black. I tried rebooting my headset (Quest 2) as suggested by a dev for another platform, but that didn't help. My headset brightness is all the way up. Also, I must play seated and every adjustment to the height offset (or any other setting) booted me back to the startup screen. I could find no way to save before changing a setting as a way to deal with that. So I've given up. Unfortunately I got so distracted playing another game that I didn't try this until day 15, one day too late to request a refund. Total waste of money.
Its amazing the art style the gameplay the story all incredible
This game has nice puzzles and doesn’t take forever to complete, however I wish they made another game like this too. You can only really play it once.

I’m 62 and I love my VR headset. I am always on the lookout for a great puzzle game and the last Clockwinder didn’t disappoint.
It had a backstory to follow, along with a task to get the clock going 
It took me a few visits to the world to get to grips with creating my workers but once I got the hang of it, the game took off.  
I will admit to having to check out a walkthrough to enable me to understand one or two rooms (and I have to say some players are geniuses)
All in all it’s a game I recommend to test logical thinking whilst also incorporating movement to get the job done

I love the game it’s very creative and the puzzles are fun but I keep running into the problem with the later levels and it’s ruining my enjoyment. Look below for spoilers as the problem is later in the game 


























I’ve been having a problem with the later levels that include the floating fruit that you can’t grab. When I do a level including them suddenly in the middle of solving the level or at the end the floating fruit just changes direction slightly and ruins the whole level. For example I was doing medical 2 and at the beginning I had no problem but as soon as I was about to finish the level and get to the product to the end one of the gardeners that handled the floating fruit started sending it in a slightly different direction ruining the whole thing that I spent so much time on and a couldn’t finish and had to restart and this happened on every levels with the floating fruit sometimes in a row. Besides this though the game is probably my favorite on quest  this bug just irritates me so much. IDK how to end this these are just my thoughts.

developer_response.body: Really sorry to hear the luft apples are giving you a hard time! Please feel free to reach out to our team at support@pontoco.com and we'll do our best to get this figured out for you moving forward!

reviews.review_title: Glad I went back to it !!
reviews.review_description: Played it first and didn't really give it a chance, but having recently given it another go, I've really enjoyed my time with it. It's such an  original concept that just works so well in VR  ,nice change of pace from the usual games I play too.

I love this game beautiful graphics, heart warming story.

I love to escape to the clock tower whenever I can.

While a great idea and story - the experiance for some one who only wishes to sit, and is poor at throwing and catching stuff is pretty frustrating. i got 3 hrs and 5 levels in before losing the will to live.

I'm an older adult and I loved this game. It had acute story, gentle music and I just loved how you have to work out the mechanics to get your fruit where it needs to go. It took me about 10 hours  of game play to complete.  I found it relaxing, while also stretching the grey matter. I would highly recommend.

reviews.review_title: One of the best games ever
reviews.review_description: One of the best games, not just vr, ive ever played. A heart warming story, great gameplay, with puzzles and WAYYYYY ore than one solution.
I just got a VR and i was worried i wouldn't find games id enjoy, i was wrong. This was such a wholesome and cute game! i absolutely loved it.
I love this game. I played it for the past three years since I got my medical quest I love the music and I’ve just done it all over and over again. I want them to make a second one.

This game was amazing, I won't spoil the ending or story but oh my lord it was great! The way the game makes you think to overcome the issues you have, whether it's finding out how to transport the fruit to where it has to go, calculating how, where, and when to place your clones, or even how to activate the machines! This game is amazing and you should seriously try.

reviews.review_title: One of the best games I played
reviews.review_description: What a cute game! Great game mechanics and use of VR. The puzzles are just perfect and I loved the story
The game did not disappoint i am 8 and i loved it the machanics and the gardener gloves abilites at the end i almost cried

Probably one of the best vr games out there amazing gameplay and storyline my only issue is that it lacks updates for the few years I had it I didn't see any changes for my first playthrough it took me like a week to complete and for the rest of them 2-3 days which is already fine but I haven't seen any new major updates like an increase on the storyline or a dlc so please give it somewhat of a good update that actually has content but overall it's a really good game

reviews.review_title: So much fun; wish there was more.
reviews.review_description:
I want so badly to give this game 5 stars but there’s a significant obstacle stopping me. The developers decided that when recording your clone actions they would disable the teleport movement feature. Reasonable, right? But when they added smooth movement to the game, that was disabled too. As a result, to maximize your clone’s effectiveness you must often move yourself in and out of range of objects without the movement controls. In a confined play area this is very problematic  I’ll try to make the best use of my space but inevitably while trying to quickly lunge for an object I will hit a wall or furniture or punch a lamp. They should have let us move with the controller so we wouldn’thabe to run out of runway, so to speak. Making barriers more prominent from a distance would also help avoid hitting atstuff. You sometimes get stuck on objects too which makes you dizzy when trying to get off but that’s not nearly as much of an issue as enraging your neighbors by smacking into walls and grunting unexpectedly  

Look, the real fun is in maximizing your scores IMO. If you’re just going to play through once meeting the minimum goals to see the end, it may not be a very fulfilling game.

Overall I love the concept of the game it really intrigues me, the automation of projects, being able to get creative and find ways to solve different challenges they present you with. I just wish there was more of it to play

reviews.review_title: Good game but only buy if on sale
reviews.review_description:
im not a speedrunner by any means and my main focus while playing was optimising my "factories" despite this i still only got 3 hours and 40 minutes of playtime which is imo not enough for a 20 gbp game with really no replayability
if its on a 50% sale i would say get it because the game is good its just a bit pricey for what its offering
also one part of this game is just ... waiting... when you get to the dewshots section even if you have a very optimised setup like i did i still had to wait like 20 minutes to progress

Okay so I’m 55/yo — just something to keep in mind. i had no expectations of this game… and it ended up being a pleasant surprise. The puzzles can be as challenging as you want them to be (how few robots to use etc) so this game can be captivating at all skill levels and yes, even “old folks” will get hooked on growing magic fruit to save this tree.Have I said too much? 🍎🍊🍐🥭🫐 Just go play…
Pretty much everything of the game is good, the story, mechanics, graphics, music. Give it a try!
So far my favorite meta game even after beating it! Creative and awesome graphics!
if you really do put a multiplayer game it would be so much fun because you can play everything with your friends

Amazing game. Perfeclty executed storyline. For me, this is a must-have.

The mechanics of this game are so amazing. Everything works like it should. For me it's always mechanics over graphics. In this case, the mechanics are so good, i just want part 2.

reviews.review_title: Blink and It's Over but it Was Fun
reviews.review_description: Too short love this game immensely but was way to short wish there was some end game challenge puzzlez or something just more I want more

This is an interesting game all about efficiency. The graphics are great, the story is definitely immersive. But in order to accomplish tasks, you have to be good at throwing and aiming. It has taken me way too long to move on because I can’t throw well.
This is instantly one of my favorite games. A brilliant soundtrack and beautiful aesthetic, paired with a cloning mechanic that is so satisfying and fun. Loved it.

Didn’t think this looked that good from marketing/video blurb. Picked it up in a sale. This game is way better than it looks on the box. It creates an atmosphere that is enchanting, presents you with multiple layer problems and runs smoothly. Do yourself a favour and get it.

I honestly had a lot of fun playing the game

Especially making cloning be like a little fun mechanic for acting that future me could return to

But I have an issue of for whatever reason despite not changing my frame rate but only my resolution the game treated my headset like it did and all the animations broke down to be slower

I still don’t know how to fix it though given even after redownloading it didn’t work

So it was nice but now I struggle to go back to it or even bother putting effort into it if it’s going to become a slide show for whatever reason

developer_response.body:
Really strange that this happened for you! We've recently added a new option to track down bugs on Quest headsets that maybe can help us get this figured out for you.

In the settings menu there is now a bit of text at the bottom that indicates the game version. If you click on that version number ten times, your session data and game save data will be uploaded to a location where we can look at it to help fix bugs.

If you do this, please also shoot us an email to support@pontoco.com to let us know so that we can get in touch with you to let you know when the issue is resolved.

reviews.review_description:
I picked up this game unsure if I would like it, but I'm so glad I did. It's not a new game but in my opinion should be considered a classic of the genre.

This game features a unique gameplay mechanic of "cloning" yourself as robots to accomplish tasks in a fantastical clocktower. The story is sweet without being overly sentimental or involved, the music is amazing, and the gameplay is uniquely VR in the best way. Do yourself a favor and give this one a try.
One of the best games in my account
It's a beautiful game and a very good storie. Recommended for everyone.

It requires a lot of hand-eye coordination. Lots of precise throwing and other movements, with precise timing, if you want high scores. The whole experience is very polished and enjoyable, with very good graphics and very good voice acting.

A fantastic experience that is hard to put into words
This groundbreaking game deserves a sequel.

It started me out in hand tracking mode, telling me to put down the controllers, which I spent ages trying to make work with janky tracking, a floor that was 2 feet below my feet, throws that went all over the place, and timing that's just too tight, before I realised that I could start the game again with controllers. That was far better, but then I couldn't figure out how to change the duration dial. Uninstalled out of frustration.

developer_response.body: Really sorry to hear about this experience! We do have a new system in place to collect information from Quest headsets about issues like these. In the settings menu there is now a bit of text at the bottom that indicates the game version. If you click on that version number ten times, your session data and game save data will be uploaded to a location where we can look at it to help fix bugs. Then reach out to us at support@pontoco.com to let us know any specific details, and se we can keep you up to date when we're able to fix things.

reviews.review_title: Awesome VR only experience, super unique
reviews.review_description:
Not only is this one super unique from a game dynamic standpoint, it also has a delightful story that you are introduced to via recorded messages which is great and adds an unexpected depth to what is already unique gameplay.

Definitely worth playing!  You do not have to hyper optimize each level if you don’t want to, but the option is there (though I am not sure achievements fully work.)

One of a kind, top 10 sort of VR experience.

The gameplay videos for this cannot properly convey how much of a joy the core mechanic of this game is to pull off. There is a really good progression of difficulty as they add in more mechanically complex plants. An interesting story and genuinely good voice acting are the cherry on top!

Don’t judge me when the story is this good 
Has to be one of my top 3 vr games of all time
Worth every penny

The game is very satisfying to play and the mechsnics work perfectly (though I've ZERO idea how I could get 8 clones to achieve 210 harvests a minute... moving as fast as possible, my 8 clones can get no more than 105/ minute. It took 18 clones to get 210...😅).
That said, I've been burnt plenty of times with VR game bugs, and I'm hoping I'm just missing something or doing something wrong.

So definitely challenging if going for the highest speed with the least amount if clones (impossible for me it seemz), and the overall environment is nice and the characters and their voice acting also excellent.
I'm definitely glad I decided to jump on trying this game out! A great addition to my  collection of VR puzzle games. 🙂

I absolutely love the mechanics used in this game. It is so satisfying to see the creation you made from just recording yourself a few times to accomplish a task. I literally sat back and watched the little clones do the job I just made them do and then realized just how timed it turned out to be making it look like a real machine at work. Each level ramps up in complexity, really making you have to get creative in some parts. Several levels have a board showing expected generation levels, but nothing more than a check mark on those and some Meta achievements. Once the game was done, I was somewhat disappointed that there wasn’t something else to do. Like there is nothing to come back for, nothing to improve on once you finish the achievements. The game took me a bit over 3 hours the first time I played it on PC, but then faster on Meta as I already knew what to do, so I did it better. The game absolutely is fun and unique, but I really wish there was a reason to play it more. Say, like leaderboards or some sort of endless puzzle mechanic that was not related to the story directly.

reviews.review_title: Make sure you can toss and aim 😂
reviews.review_description: So I just got the game and kinda got stuck on the 1st time at the very very beginning because I was trying hands tracking(no controllers) and learning the game mechanics all at once. But on the 2nd try, I finally lit up the room and started to find seeds, play tapes, and throw fruits in the container. Fun fact, it wasn't obvious to me that I needed to throw and aim things when I bought the game 😆
I just beat the game and I'm dying for more! It was addicting I never wanted to put it down. Loved every second!! Definitely recommend.

This game it fantastic. Really enjoyed it, sad I’ve completed it. Some of the levels were frustrating as the same actions from the bots didn’t always get the same result. Love it tho. Will be playing it again. Well worth the money. LOVE

This game is truly amazing. An amazing and unique gameplay that works like a clock (sorry for pun) in VR. A beautiful story that makes you sad and happy at the same time, something of Firewatch storytelling level. Great puzzles that make you think hard and feel good when you solve it. Great level design and musical atmosphere. Truly a masterpiece that makes you enjoy and remember every single moment of it.
This ain't for me. Too much puzzle. Not enough action.

This game ONLY works with VR. It’s such a cool concept where you make clones of yourself performing the EXACT movements you do to repeat a process. You do this time and time again to make the most efficient machine engine you can. There are literally endless ways to solve a puzzle and it always challenges you to do it in a more efficient way. The story is great, the voice acting is great, and most importantly the gameplay is great.
Awful download speed
This game Is really fun I recommend getting it it's a great game for everyone

I purchased this on my oc 2 I have an oc 3 now and this 1 didn't and hasn't shown up on my games that are available!! Where is it??!! I really want it on my new device,  since I did pay for it!! Who do I need to contact and /or do? I've also noticed some of the songs that I had purchased for beat saber was missing too.. not cool!!

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear the game isn't showing up for you! This sounds like it might be an account issue if it's happening with Beat Saber as well. Try reaching out to their support team and see if they have any input - https://www.meta.com/help/support/ on what might happening.

reviews.review_description: I find it extremely boring.
I literally cannot pass the bagertail introduction because it fell through the map

developer_response.body: Eek! Very sorry to hear that. Please shoot us an email to support@pontoco.com so we can figure out what happened and get everything working properly for you.

reviews.review_description: I can’t get the robots to clone themselves. I’ve tried contacting the company and tried to go through the oculus but no luck. Then I was told sorry you wanted to long. Good luck, because it does look like fun.

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry to hear there's been trouble with the game! Can you email us at support@pontoco.com and tell us more about what's going on? We want to get this fixed for you.

reviews.review_description: Was so excited for this game to launch but throwing is not a motion for the seated handicapped player.  Gave up after a few frustrating hours.   Barely made it past the 1st room.   Would have kept trying if the next room wasn’t another throwing-catching challenge.  Discouraging and Impossible for me.

developer_response.body: Hi - we're really sorry about this. If you're past the window for a refund from Meta, please email us at support@pontoco.com and we can offer a refund ourselves. And thank you for bringing this to our attention, if you have more to share about your experience here or general feedback please feel free to share it with us in the email as well.

reviews.review_description:
Love the idea of the game and all things about it however for someone with a disability that can no longer play games standing, my refund was refused.  Likely went over the 2 hours limit in playing it. 

It’s genuinely useless to anyone who can’t stand.

developer_response.body: Hey there, please reach out to us at support@pontoco.com. We'll figure out a way to get the refund processed. Thanks for giving the game a try -- we appreciate it!

reviews.review_description:
Its impossible to use this sitting down.
I have a health condition where I cannot stand to long.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear you had trouble! You might not believe it, but we did try to design this to be playable sitting down, and I actually played seated during most of the development! 

The intention was to make one clone at each planter/station and pass things around, rather than to use a single clone to reach between them. That said.. the game is definitely a bit more challenging when seated, and encourages you to keep reaching for just the next planter over.

In any case, please reach out to us over at support@pontoco.com. Sorry about the frustration!

reviews.review_description: The last clockwinder is one of the best games personally I have ever played on this platform, it offers a complete story packed with puzzles and a deep storyline. The clones are amazing and copy exactly what you’re doing with no glitches at all, so I rate this a 11/10 experience
Wanted a puzzle game but this one is more physical!

developer_response.body:
Hi, sorry to hear you aren't enjoying the game!

Meta has a refund policy that covers getting a refund if you find a game isn't a good fit for you and you've played less than two hours, so if you're not having fun please feel free to return it!

reviews.review_description: I believe this is a good game but you need a bit play area to create and record the movements. It is described as supporting sitting or standing but that is not realistic. You won’t realize until too late to refund that you may not have the space to play it. Caveat emptor.

developer_response.body: So sorry to hear that you’re not able to play the game as intended! Could you contact us at support@pontoco.com? We may be able to offer you a refund.

reviews.review_title: Did one bug just ruin my game?
reviews.review_description:
There are no walkthroughs out there besides videos. 
I have watched a video where you get a room key at the dewshots room that leads you to the Root Nexus room.

I have searched high and low for all of those keys, and since there are none in the dewshot room, I can’t proceed. I’ve checked everywhere, though I hate going back to the rooms with the knives as for whatever reason the clone loses the knife everytime.

Super frustrating considering I don’t usually use walkthroughs, but I had to for this because it seems like a bug that can potentially ruin your game.

I don’t usually use discord either. that platform confuses the hell out of me.

developer_response.body:
Hi, sorry to hear about this!

If the key isn't where it appears in the walkthrough that's definitely a bug. Can you reach out to us by email to support@pontoco.com? We can try to help troubleshoot this with you and hopefully get things working again.

reviews.review_title: Want to like it but it's unplayable
reviews.review_description:
Want to like it but it's unplayable. It keeps resetting the height into the ground. And the tubes fall through. And disappear. Hopefully it's just opening day bugs. 

Otherwise I'll have to return it. I'll give it some time before I make a decision.

developer_response.body:
Hi Y0b0g0ya,

This is definitely something we should be able to fix. Can you reach out to us at hello@pontoco.com, or post in our Discord? (https://discord.com/invite/N7qQ3E4Pus) 

We'll help you figure it out! In the meantime if you'd like to return it, no worries at all.

Thanks,
John

reviews.review_description: Wont download at all

developer_response.body:
Hi, so sorry to hear this!

Are you able to download other things from the oculus store, just not this game? If you're able to follow up on discord (https://discord.gg/8SVpTABjmU) or by email (to support@pontoco.com) we can try to troubleshoot with you.

reviews.review_description: Game is bugged. You can't pick up the gloves. Unplayable save you $26

developer_response.body:
Update: Hi LethalGanks! This issue should be resolved in the latest build. Send us an email if you're still seeing the issue.

Hi, so sorry about this! It's a known issue affecting some players that we're currently working on a fix for. In the meantime, we do have a workaround detailed here: https://pontoco.youtrack.cloud/issue/TLC-2.

If you'd like, please reach out by email to support@pontoco.com or on our discord (https://discord.gg/8SVpTABjmU) and we'll be able to provide more support.

reviews.review_description:
We really enjoyed the last clock winder. It's a fun game that makes you work through puzzles to get the clock to start again.  You control robots to do the work for you.  

For discount use my referral link
https://www.oculus.com/referrals/link/sodaViking/

My best vr experience so far! The levels are tricky and fun to manage, the graphics are beautiful, the story is presented in little audio snippets which i really enjoyed. But the best is the unique gameplay of recording the own movement. Easy to learn with infinite possibilities.
Loved it. Sad to have finished it :(

There’s no right or wrong solutions, it’s all about an efficient solution. A lot of the time the puzzles seem straightforward, but where the complexity arises is in timing it all right and being able to aim. Sometimes you make shots on the first try, and sometimes you have to take a full-day break before trying again.

Otherwise the mechanics of the game is very cool, and it’s fun if you’re willing to spend a lot of time thinking about where you should be, and when you should act.
Ok yeah never mind my last review was saying the game was great but a bit too short but now I see that’s my fault for going too fast XD. Yeah good job.
For solving puzzles VR
It’s SUCH a fun game! I would give it 10 stars if I could. It definitely makes you think which I love and the story is cute
Fluid smooth gameplay, hoping for a part two.

I really love this game.❤ Use my referral code for 25% off.
Remove space between ". com" 

https://www.oculus. com/appreferrals/Shanaapje/4837365566303714/?utm_source=4

No buts about it, this game was amazing from beginning to end. It has been such a long time since the story of a game has left me with a feeling of closure. The puzzles are fun with creative solutions. The mechanics are executed amazingly. A few bugs here and there, but nothing that broke immersion too much. A must play for anyone who loves puzzles or a good story.
This is my favorite game, it's worth buying a head set just for this game

I’m not kidding when I say this is one of my favourite VR games. The story is really well written and the voice acting is on point. The puzzles and levels are challenging but not frustrating as it makes you think outside the box to solve some of the problems. Overall this is a great game to start of with as it’s not quiet hard but also fun and well made

I could not put it down! I would go to bed thinking how to solve the puzzles and better my production. I teared up at the end and hesitated to finish it. I didn't want it to end. I really hope the developers come up with a 2nd part to it and continue the adventure. Awesome game and story 👍

New to VR and an older player.  This really helped me orient myself in the VR world and is truly packed with puzzling challenges.  The accomplishment felt after solving simple to hard puzzles reminds me of my “Zelda” days!  I did change physical rooms a couple of times as I found the bigger the room the better.  Hoping this story continues as even after 9hr36m of play time, I want more!

From the very beginning The Last Clockwinder captures your imagination and tests your creative problem solving by requiring you to proceed through a series of puzzles towards the ultimate, end goal. It's like a virtual escape room -- only you are trying to move deeper into the room, rather than escape out.

The artwork is beautiful. The voice actors and script carry you through the story line without leading you in any specific way. The music is inspiring and likely to become your next earworm.

This is a great game to play at parties, when casted to a TV, because it is fun to watch/coach others as they create their own solutions and contraptions.

I highly recommend this game! Add it to your library -- you won't be sorry!!
